title: Preparation of cell-sized water-in-oil droplets for in vitro reconstitution of biological processes in cellular compartments
author: sprotocols
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: This protocol presents a method for encapsulation of purified proteins into cell-sized water-in-oil droplets surrounded by a phospholipid monolayer, which can be broadly applied to studies to reconstitute biological processes in cellular compartments.
steps_raw: This protocol presents a method for encapsulation of purified proteins into cell-sized water-in-oil droplets surrounded by a phospholipid monolayer, which can be broadly applied to studies to reconstitute biological processes in cellular compartments.
